title: Specified State Leaders' (Grant of Terminal Benefits) Order, 1986
title_en: Specified State Leaders' (Grant of Terminal Benefits) Order, 1986

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Specified State Leaders' (Grant of Terminal Benefits) Order.

The persons whose names are specified in the Schedule to this Order, who ceased to hold the specified State offices and on the dates respectively specified opposite to their names in the second and third columns of the Schedule shall each, upon approval by resolution of the National Assembly, be entitled to terminal benefits in accordance with the provisions of the Specified State Leaders' Retirement Benefits Act. Schedule Column 1 Column 2 Column 3 Name Specified State Office Date of Cessation 1. Late Sheikh Amani Karume First Vice-President 7th April, 1972 2. Rashid Mfaume Kawawa Second Vice-President and Prime Minister 14th February, 1977 3. Cleopa David Msuya Prime Minister 23rd February, 1983 4. Aboud Jumbe Mwinyi Vice-President 23rd January, 1984 5. Late Edward Moringe Ole-Sokoine Prime Minister 12th April, 1984 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
